name: goal-matrix-iterative-delivery
description: Fuses Superpowers, Ponytail, Codex hooks, and user operating habits into a goal-matrix engineering workflow.

interface.longDescription: Use a visible goal matrix, one active child goal, user truth-source habits, real verification, and Ponytail-style scope control for project work.
defaultPrompt: Use goal matrix delivery for this task.
Run one child goal with real verification.
Audit this plan for goal drift.
